Marketing.title: How To Use AI To Support Your Design Process
Marketing.summary: If you’re trying to figure out how to use AI for graphic design without wrecking your creative process, you’re asking the right question.  This is about removing friction, not replacing designers. AI tools now live inside Figma, Adobe, and most product workflows.

Marketing.title: How Voice Search Ads Are Changing The Search Term Report in 2026
Marketing.summary: If you’ve looked at a Google Ads Search Term Report (STR) lately, you know it feels like stepping off a merry-go-round a little too fast. The tidy lists of “best running shoes” or “mortgage rates NYC” that we built entire careers around? Those are fading out.

Design.title: Testing Font Scaling For Accessibility With Figma Variables
Design.summary: Accessibility works best when it blends into everyday design workflows. The goal isn’t a big transformation, but simple work processes that fit naturally into a team’s routine. Design.title: Dropdowns Inside Scrollable Containers: Why They Break And How To Fix Them Properly
Design.summary: Dropdowns often work perfectly until they’re placed inside a scrollable panel, where they can get clipped, and half the menu disappears behind the container’s edge. Godstime Aburu explains why this happens and offers practical solutions to fix it.

Tech.title: Roku’s $3 Howdy subscription service launches on Prime Video
Tech.summary: Launched in August 2025, Howdy features a library of nearly 10,000 hours of content from its partners, including Lionsgate, Sony Pictures, Disney Entertainment, Warner Bros. Discovery, and FilmRise, alongside select Roku Original titles.

Tech.title: FCC bans import of new consumer routers made overseas, citing security risks
Tech.summary: The FCC ban will affect the import of all new, foreign-made consumer routers, the agency's head Brendan Carr said.

Tech.title: TikTok ads are about to get a tad more disruptive
Tech.summary: One new ad format displays another brand's logo alongside TikTok's on the launch page when users open the app.

Tech.title: Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video editing app Captions
Tech.summary: Mirage, the maker of video editing app Captions, has raised $75 million in growth financing from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF).

Tech.summary: The new feature lets you explore samples, covers, and more about the people behind your favorite songs, says Spotify.

Tech.summary: For All Mankind starts streaming again this week, with its fifth season set to premiere on March 27th. Tech.title: Ayaneo says selling its Windows gaming handheld ‘is no longer sustainable’
Tech.summary: Ayaneo is suspending preorders for its $1,999 Next 2 gaming handheld due to the skyrocketing price of digital storage.
